task_completion.description: Create and use a Docker context named 'staging' pointing to the remote host.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker context create staging --docker "host=tcp://staging-node:2375"' and subsequent use of this context (e.g., 'docker context use staging' or passing '--context staging' to commands).

task_completion.description: Diagnose the failure of the existing 'web-proxy' container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing commands like 'docker logs web-proxy' or 'docker inspect web-proxy' to investigate why the container crashed, revealing the missing UPSTREAM_TARGET environment variable.
Terminal showing the execution of 'docker rm -f web-proxy' or 'docker rm web-proxy' to clear the name for the replacement container.

task_completion.description: Run a new 'web-proxy' container with the correct image, port mapping, and environment variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'docker run' command that includes '--name web-proxy', '-p 8080:80', '-e UPSTREAM_TARGET=<some_value>', and the image 'nginx:alpine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new container is running successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the output of 'docker ps' with the 'web-proxy' container listed, its status as 'Up', using the 'nginx:alpine' image, and displaying the '8080->80/tcp' port mapping.

integrity.description: Check that the agent executed commands in a real terminal emulator.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands and outputs should be visible in a terminal window (like bash or zsh), not just typed into a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use SSH to access the remote node directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no 'ssh ga@staging-node' or similar SSH commands executed. The task explicitly forbids SSH access and requires using the Docker API.

integrity.description: Verify that the Docker daemon responses look genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Docker output formats, such as 64-character hex container IDs returned after 'docker run', or standard image pulling progress bars for 'nginx:alpine'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The remote Docker daemon is located at tcp://staging-node:2375. The target container must be named 'web-proxy'. The specific environment variable required to fix the container crash is 'UPSTREAM_TARGET'. The new container must use the 'nginx:alpine' image and map host port 8080 to container port 80 (-p 8080:80).
